description: Triggers when user needs to start feature work in isolation or before executing an implementation plan
should_trigger: I need to start working on a new feature branch in isolation
Set up an isolated workspace before running the implementation plan
Create a git worktree for my authentication feature
I want to work on multiple branches at the same time
Prepare a clean baseline workspace before starting subagent-driven development
should_not_trigger: Commit my changes to the current branch
Merge my feature branch into main
Run git rebase on my branch
Create a pull request for my feature
